@font-face{font-family:'Plus Jakarta Sans';font-style:normal;font-weight:400 800;font-display:swap;src:url(/assets/fonts/plus-jakarta-var.woff2) format('woff2');unicode-range:U+0000-00FF, U+0131, U+0152-0153, U+02BB-02BC, U+02C6, U+02DA, U+02DC, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+2000-206F, U+20AC, U+2122, U+2191, U+2193, U+2212, U+2215, U+FEFF, U+FFFD}@font-face{font-family:'Plus Jakarta Sans';font-style:normal;font-weight:400 800;font-display:swap;src:url(/assets/fonts/plus-jakarta-latinext.woff2) format('woff2');unicode-range:U+0100-02BA, U+02BD-02C5, U+02C7-02CC, U+02CE-02D7, U+02DD-02FF, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+1D00-1DBF, U+1E00-1E9F, U+1EF2-1EFF, U+2020, U+20A0-20AB, U+20AD-20C0, U+2113, U+2C60-2C7F, U+A720-A7FF}
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}
:root{
  --cream:#FAF7F2;--cream-2:#F2ECE3;
  --ink:#1A1824;--ink-2:#3B3548;--ink-3:#8C88A6;
  --indigo:#5F5289;--indigo-2:#B5AACC;--indigo-7:#403950;--indigo-9:#2A2539;
  --lilac:#EEE9F4;--lilac-2:#DBD3E7;--lilac-line:#D4CBE1;
  --gold:#E29B54;--gold-2:#C97F33;--gold-soft:#FCEFDE;
  --card:#fff;--line:#E9E5F1;--wa:#25D366;
  --r:28px;--r-lg:34px;--r-sm:16px;--pill:999px;
  --sh:0 2px 4px rgba(26,24,36,.04),0 32px 64px -36px rgba(26,24,36,.30);
  --sh-sm:0 1px 2px rgba(26,24,36,.04),0 16px 34px -24px rgba(26,24,36,.20);
  --font:'Plus Jakarta Sans',-apple-system,'Segoe UI',Roboto,sans-serif;
}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth}
body{font-family:var(--font);background:var(--cream);color:var(--ink);line-height:1.6;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;overflow-x:clip}
a{color:inherit;text-decoration:none}
img{max-width:100%;display:block}
.wrap{max-width:1320px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 28px}
section{padding:96px 0}
h1,h2,h3{line-height:1.12;letter-spacing:-.02em;font-weight:800;text-wrap:balance}
h2{font-size:clamp(30px,4vw,46px)}
.eyebrow{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--indigo);background:var(--lilac);padding:8px 14px;border-radius:var(--pill);margin-bottom:20px}
.eyebrow.gold{color:var(--gold-2);background:var(--gold-soft)}
.sec-head{max-width:720px;margin-bottom:52px}
.sec-head p{color:var(--ink-2);font-size:18px;margin-top:16px;text-wrap:pretty}
.sec-head.center{margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto;text-align:center}

/* buttons */
.btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:9px;font-family:var(--font);font-weight:700;font-size:15px;padding:15px 26px;border-radius:var(--pill);border:0;cursor:pointer;transition:transform .18s,box-shadow .18s,background .18s;white-space:nowrap}
.btn:active{transform:scale(.97)}
.btn-primary{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--indigo-2),var(--indigo-7));color:#fff;box-shadow:0 14px 30px -12px rgba(95,82,137,.6)}
.btn-primary:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 20px 40px -14px rgba(95,82,137,.7)}
.btn-gold{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gold),var(--gold-2));color:#fff;box-shadow:0 14px 30px -12px rgba(201,127,51,.55)}
.btn-gold:hover{transform:translateY(-2px)}
.btn-ghost{background:#fff;color:var(--ink);box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1.5px var(--line)}
.btn-ghost:hover{box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1.5px var(--indigo);color:var(--indigo)}
.btn-wa{background:var(--wa);color:#062b16}
.btn-lg{padding:18px 32px;font-size:16px}

/* topbar + header */
.topbar{background:var(--indigo-9);color:rgba(255,255,255,.82);font-size:13px;font-weight:500}
.topbar .wrap{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;height:40px;gap:16px}
.topbar b{color:#fff}
.topbar .tb-r{display:flex;gap:18px;align-items:center}
header{position:sticky;top:0;z-index:50;background:rgba(250,247,242,.86);backdrop-filter:saturate(1.4) blur(14px);border-bottom:1px solid var(--line)}
header .wrap{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:28px;height:74px}
.logo{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:11px;font-weight:800;font-size:20px;letter-spacing:-.01em}
.logo-mark{width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:11px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--indigo-2),var(--indigo-9));display:grid;place-items:center;box-shadow:0 8px 18px -8px rgba(95,82,137,.6)}
.logo small{display:block;font-size:9.5px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.14em;color:var(--ink-3);margin-top:1px}
nav.main{display:flex;gap:26px;margin-left:8px}
nav.main a{font-size:15px;font-weight:600;color:var(--ink-2);transition:color .15s}
nav.main a:hover{color:var(--indigo)}
.hd-r{margin-left:auto;display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:center}
.hd-r .lk{font-size:15px;font-weight:700;color:var(--ink)}
.burger{display:none;place-items:center;width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:13px;border:1.5px solid var(--line);background:#fff;cursor:pointer}
.mnav{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:100vh;height:100dvh;z-index:300;background:var(--cream);display:flex;flex-direction:column;padding:18px 22px calc(24px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom));overflow-y:auto;-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;overscroll-behavior:contain;opacity:0;visibility:hidden;transform:translateY(-10px);transition:opacity .3s cubic-bezier(.16,.7,.2,1),transform .3s cubic-bezier(.16,.7,.2,1),visibility .3s}html.menu-open,html.menu-open body{overflow:hidden}html.menu-open body{position:fixed;width:100%;left:0;right:0}.mnav-top{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:14px}.mnav-brand{font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.14em;font-size:15px;color:var(--indigo-9)}.mnav-x{width:44px;height:44px;display:grid;place-items:center;border-radius:13px;border:1.5px solid var(--line);background:#fff;color:var(--ink);cursor:pointer}.mnav-links{display:flex;flex-direction:column}.mnav-links a::after{content:"";width:8px;height:8px;border-right:2px solid var(--indigo-2);border-top:2px solid var(--indigo-2);transform:rotate(45deg);opacity:.8;flex:none}.mnav-portal{color:var(--indigo)!important}.mnav-wa{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:10px;margin-top:20px;padding:16px;border-radius:16px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--indigo),var(--indigo-7));color:#fff;font-size:16px;font-weight:700;box-shadow:0 14px 28px -12px rgba(46,40,58,.55)}.mnav-wa svg{width:20px;height:20px}
.mnav.open{opacity:1;visibility:visible;transform:none}
header{position:sticky}
.mnav-links a{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:16px 6px;font-size:18.5px;font-weight:600;color:var(--ink);border-bottom:1px solid var(--lilac-line)}
.mnav-links a:last-child{border-bottom:0}

/* hero */
.hero{position:relative;padding:40px 0 56px;overflow:hidden;min-height:calc(100svh - 118px);display:flex;align-items:center}
.hero>.wrap{width:100%;max-width:1400px}
.hero::before{content:"";position:absolute;top:-180px;right:-160px;width:620px;height:620px;border-radius:50%;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(181,170,204,.14),transparent 68%);pointer-events:none}
.hero::after{content:"";position:absolute;bottom:-160px;left:-120px;width:460px;height:460px;border-radius:50%;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(226,155,84,.14),transparent 68%);pointer-events:none}
.hero-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.02fr 1.08fr;gap:64px;align-items:center;position:relative}
.hero h1{font-size:clamp(38px,5.4vw,62px);margin:6px 0 20px}
.hero h1 em{font-style:normal;color:var(--indigo)}
.hero .lead{font-size:20px;color:var(--ink-2);max-width:600px;margin-bottom:26px}
.hero-ctas{display:flex;gap:14px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:30px}
.proof{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--line);padding:10px 18px 10px 12px;border-radius:var(--pill);box-shadow:var(--sh-sm)}
.proof .avs{display:flex}
.proof .avs img{width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:50%;border:2.5px solid #fff;object-fit:cover;margin-left:-12px}
.proof .avs img:first-child{margin-left:0}
.proof b{font-size:14px}
.proof span{font-size:13px;color:var(--ink-3);display:block}

/* video card */
.vcard{position:relative}
.vplayer{display:block;width:100%;aspect-ratio:16/9;position:relative;border:0;padding:0;cursor:pointer;border-radius:var(--r);overflow:hidden;background:var(--indigo-9);box-shadow:var(--sh)}
.vplayer .vthumb{position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;filter:saturate(.8)}
.vplayer::after{content:"";position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(8deg,rgba(47,38,88,.84),rgba(42,37,57,.38) 46%,rgba(42,37,57,.10) 78%);pointer-events:none}
.vplay{position:absolute;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);width:74px;height:74px;border-radius:50%;background:#fff;display:grid;place-items:center;box-shadow:0 12px 30px -8px rgba(0,0,0,.4);transition:transform .2s}
.vplay svg{margin-left:4px}
.vplayer:hover .vplay{transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(1.08)}
.vtag{position:absolute;left:14px;bottom:14px;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;background:rgba(24,21,32,.62);color:#fff;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.04em;padding:7px 12px;border-radius:var(--pill)}
.vtag i{width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--gold)}
.vdur{position:absolute;right:14px;bottom:14px;background:rgba(24,21,32,.82);color:#fff;font-size:12.5px;font-weight:600;padding:5px 10px;border-radius:10px}
.vframe{width:100%;aspect-ratio:16/9;border:0;border-radius:var(--r);box-shadow:var(--sh)}
.vcap{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin-top:16px;padding-left:4px}
.vcap .vb{width:42px;height:42px;border-radius:12px;background:var(--gold-soft);display:grid;place-items:center;flex:none}
.vcap b{font-size:14.5px}.vcap span{display:block;font-size:12.5px;color:var(--ink-3)}

/* stats */
.stats{background:transparent}
.stats-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:20px}
.stat{background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:var(--r);padding:30px 26px;text-align:center;box-shadow:var(--sh-sm)}
.stat .n{font-size:clamp(30px,3.6vw,42px);font-weight:800;color:var(--indigo);letter-spacing:-.03em;line-height:1}
.stat .n em{font-style:normal;color:inherit;opacity:.85}
.stat .l{font-size:14px;color:var(--ink-2);margin-top:10px;font-weight:500}

/* trust strip */
.trust{background:var(--indigo-9);color:rgba(255,255,255,.9)}
.trust .wrap{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:16px 40px;align-items:center;justify-content:center;text-align:center;font-size:14.5px;font-weight:500}
.trust b{color:#fff}
.trust .stars{color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:2px}
.trust .dot{width:5px;height:5px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(255,255,255,.3)}

/* directions cards */
.dir-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:22px}
/* --- perk block (what the card gives you) --- */
.perk-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:22px}
.perk{background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:var(--r);padding:30px 26px;box-shadow:var(--sh-sm);transition:transform .2s,box-shadow .2s}
.perk:hover{transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:0 22px 44px -26px rgba(26,24,36,.30)}
.perk .ic{width:54px;height:54px;border-radius:15px;display:grid;place-items:center;margin-bottom:18px}
.perk.pv .ic{background:var(--lilac)}
.perk.pg .ic{background:var(--gold-soft)}
.perk h3{font-size:19px;margin-bottom:8px}
.perk p{font-size:14.5px;color:var(--ink-2);line-height:1.6}
.perk-cta{display:flex;gap:20px;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:36px}
.perk-cta .btn{margin-top:0;width:auto}
.perk-ask{font-weight:700;font-size:14.5px;color:var(--indigo);display:inline-flex;gap:7px;align-items:center}
.perk-ask:hover{text-decoration:underline}
.blog-all{text-align:center;margin-top:36px}
.blog-all .btn{width:auto;margin-top:0}
/* тонкое фирменное свечение в углу карточек — живее, но не отвлекает */
.perk{position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.perk::after{content:"";position:absolute;top:-50px;right:-50px;width:170px;height:170px;border-radius:50%;pointer-events:none;z-index:0}
.perk.pv::after{background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(95,82,137,.11),transparent 68%)}
.perk.pg::after{background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(201,127,51,.10),transparent 68%)}
.perk>*{position:relative;z-index:1}
.bcard{position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.bcard::after{content:"";position:absolute;bottom:-60px;left:-40px;width:180px;height:180px;border-radius:50%;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(95,82,137,.07),transparent 70%);pointer-events:none;z-index:0}
.bcard>*{position:relative;z-index:1}


@media(max-width:900px){.perk-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}}
@media(max-width:560px){.perk-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}.perk-cta{flex-direction:column;gap:14px}}

.dir{background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:var(--r);padding:32px 28px;box-shadow:var(--sh-sm);position:relative;transition:transform .2s,box-shadow .2s;display:flex;flex-direction:column}
.dir:hover{transform:translateY(-5px);box-shadow:var(--sh)}
.dir.pop{border-color:transparent;box-shadow:0 0 0 2px var(--indigo),var(--sh)}
.dir .badge{position:absolute;top:-12px;left:28px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gold),var(--gold-2));color:#fff;font-size:11px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.06em;padding:6px 13px;border-radius:var(--pill);box-shadow:0 8px 18px -8px rgba(201,127,51,.6)}
.dir .ic{width:56px;height:56px;border-radius:16px;display:grid;place-items:center;margin-bottom:20px}
.dir.i1 .ic{background:var(--lilac)}.dir.i2 .ic{background:var(--gold-soft)}.dir.i3 .ic{background:var(--lilac)}.dir.i4 .ic{background:var(--gold-soft)}
.dir h3{font-size:21px;margin-bottom:10px}
.dir>p{color:var(--ink-2);font-size:14.5px;margin-bottom:18px}
.dir ul{list-style:none;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:9px;margin-bottom:22px;flex:1}
.dir li{display:flex;gap:9px;font-size:14px;color:var(--ink-2)}
.dir li svg{flex:none;margin-top:3px}
.dir .go{font-weight:700;font-size:14px;color:var(--indigo);display:inline-flex;gap:6px;align-items:center}
.svc-more{text-align:center;margin-top:34px}
.svc-more a{font-weight:700;color:var(--indigo);font-size:15px}

/* steps */
.steps{background:var(--lilac)}
.steps-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:22px}
.step{background:#fff;border-radius:var(--r);padding:30px 26px;box-shadow:var(--sh-sm);position:relative}
.step .num{width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:14px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--indigo-2),var(--indigo-9));color:#fff;font-weight:800;font-size:18px;display:grid;place-items:center;margin-bottom:18px}
.step h3{font-size:18px;margin-bottom:9px}
.step p{font-size:14px;color:var(--ink-2)}
.mos-note{margin-top:26px;background:#fff;border-radius:var(--r);padding:22px 26px;display:flex;gap:16px;align-items:flex-start;box-shadow:var(--sh-sm)}
.mos-note .ic{width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:12px;background:var(--gold-soft);flex:none;display:grid;place-items:center}
.mos-note p{font-size:14px;color:var(--ink-2);max-width:72ch}.mos-note b{color:var(--ink)}

/* guarantee */
.guar .wrap{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--indigo-9),#5A5079);border-radius:var(--r-lg);padding:64px 56px;color:#fff;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.guar::selection{}
.guar .wrap::after{content:"";position:absolute;right:-80px;top:-80px;width:340px;height:340px;border-radius:50%;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(226,155,84,.22),transparent 70%)}
.guar-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr auto;gap:50px;align-items:center;position:relative;z-index:1}
.guar h2{color:#fff;max-width:640px}
.guar .lead{color:rgba(255,255,255,.8);font-size:17px;margin:18px 0 26px;max-width:540px}
.guar .pts{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:12px;margin-bottom:30px}
.guar .pt{display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:flex-start;font-size:15px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.9);max-width:520px}
.guar .pt svg{flex:none;margin-top:3px}
.seal{width:200px;height:200px;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid rgba(226,155,84,.5);display:grid;place-items:center;text-align:center;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(226,155,84,.16),transparent 70%)}
.seal .big{font-size:46px;font-weight:800;color:var(--gold);line-height:1}
.seal small{font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.18em;color:rgba(255,255,255,.7);text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:6px}

/* VS */
.vs-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:24px}
.vs{border-radius:var(--r);padding:34px 30px}
.vs.a{background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--line)}
.vs.b{background:linear-gradient(150deg,#fff, var(--lilac));border:2px solid var(--indigo)}
.vs h3{font-size:20px;margin-bottom:20px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px}
.vs.a h3{color:var(--ink-3)}
.vs ul{list-style:none;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px}
.vs li{display:flex;gap:11px;font-size:15px;color:var(--ink-2)}
.vs.b li{color:var(--ink)}
.vs li svg{flex:none;margin-top:2px}
.vs .btn{margin-top:26px;width:100%}

/* reviews */
.reviews{background:#fff}
.rev-top{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-end;gap:24px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:44px}
.gbadge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;background:var(--cream);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:var(--r);padding:16px 22px}
.gbadge .score{font-size:34px;font-weight:800;color:var(--ink);line-height:1}
.gbadge .stars{color:var(--gold);font-size:15px;letter-spacing:1px}
.gbadge small{color:var(--ink-3);font-size:12.5px}
.rev-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:22px}
.rev{background:var(--cream);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:var(--r);padding:28px 26px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px}
.rev .stars{color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:1px;font-size:14px}
.rev p{font-size:15px;color:var(--ink);flex:1}
.rev .who{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px}
.rev .who .av{width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover}
.rev .who b{font-size:14.5px;display:block}
.rev .who span{font-size:12.5px;color:var(--ink-3)}

/* blog + wa */
.blog-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:22px}
.bcard{background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:var(--r);padding:30px 28px;box-shadow:var(--sh-sm);display:flex;flex-direction:column;transition:transform .2s,box-shadow .2s}
.bcard:hover{transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:var(--sh)}
.bcard .cat{font-size:11px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold-2);margin-bottom:14px}
.bcard h3{font-size:18px;line-height:1.35;margin-bottom:10px}
.bcard p{font-size:14px;color:var(--ink-2);flex:1;margin-bottom:18px}
.bfoot{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;border-top:1px solid var(--line);padding-top:16px}
.bread{font-weight:700;font-size:14px;color:var(--indigo)}
.bask{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;font-weight:700;font-size:12.5px;color:var(--ink-2)}
.bask svg{width:15px;height:15px}
.bask:hover{color:#128C4B}
.blog-wa{margin-top:28px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:20px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--indigo-9),#5A5079);border-radius:var(--r);padding:26px 30px;color:#fff}
.blog-wa .ic{width:52px;height:52px;border-radius:15px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15);display:grid;place-items:center;flex:none}
.blog-wa .tx{flex:1;font-size:14.5px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.85)}.blog-wa .tx b{color:#fff}
.blog-wa .btn{flex:none}

/* faq */
.faq{background:var(--lilac)}
.faq-wrap{max-width:820px;margin:0 auto}
details.q{background:#fff;border-radius:var(--r-sm);margin-bottom:14px;box-shadow:var(--sh-sm);overflow:hidden}
details.q summary{list-style:none;cursor:pointer;padding:22px 26px;font-weight:700;font-size:16.5px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:16px;align-items:center}
details.q summary::-webkit-details-marker{display:none}
details.q summary .pl{width:26px;height:26px;flex:none;border-radius:50%;background:var(--lilac);display:grid;place-items:center;color:var(--indigo);transition:transform .2s;font-size:18px;line-height:1}
details.q[open] summary .pl{transform:rotate(45deg)}
details.q .a{padding:0 26px 24px;color:var(--ink-2);font-size:15px}

/* referral */
.ref .wrap{background:var(--cream);border:1px solid var(--gold-soft);border-radius:var(--r-lg);padding:52px 48px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.2fr 1fr;gap:44px;align-items:center}
.ref h2{margin-bottom:22px}
.ref .rs{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:12px}
.ref .rs div{display:flex;gap:12px;font-size:15px;color:var(--ink-2)}
.ref .rs b{width:26px;height:26px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--gold);color:#fff;display:grid;place-items:center;font-size:13px;flex:none}
.ref .num{background:#fff;border-radius:var(--r);padding:34px;text-align:center;box-shadow:var(--sh-sm)}
.ref .num .big{font-size:40px;font-weight:800;color:var(--gold-2);line-height:1;letter-spacing:-.02em}
.ref .num p{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--ink-2);margin:12px 0 20px}

/* final cta */
.final .wrap{background:linear-gradient(140deg,rgba(42,37,57,.92),rgba(90,80,121,.88)),url(/assets/trc/nx_team1.jpg) center/cover;border-radius:var(--r-lg);padding:60px 54px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 440px;gap:50px;align-items:center;color:#fff;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.final .wrap::after{content:"";position:absolute;left:-90px;bottom:-90px;width:360px;height:360px;border-radius:50%;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(181,170,204,.4),transparent 70%)}
.final h2{color:#fff;margin-bottom:16px}
.final .lead{color:rgba(255,255,255,.8);font-size:17px;margin-bottom:26px}
.final .cts{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:12px;position:relative;z-index:1}
.final .cts .row{display:flex;gap:11px;font-size:14.5px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.86)}
.final .cts .row b{color:#fff}
.ffbox{background:#fff;border-radius:var(--r);padding:30px;position:relative;z-index:1;box-shadow:var(--sh)}
.ffbox .t{font-weight:800;font-size:19px;color:var(--ink)}
.ffbox .s{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--ink-3);margin:6px 0 20px}
.ffbox input,.ffbox select{width:100%;font-family:var(--font);font-size:15px;padding:14px 16px;border:1.5px solid var(--line);border-radius:14px;margin-bottom:12px;color:var(--ink);background:#fff}
.ffbox input:focus,.ffbox select:focus{outline:none;border-color:var(--indigo)}
.ffbox .btn{width:100%;margin-top:4px}
.ffbox .fine{font-size:12px;color:var(--ink-3);text-align:center;margin-top:12px}

/* footer */
footer{background:#362B66;color:rgba(255,255,255,.66);padding:80px 0 36px;font-size:14px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;border-top:1px solid rgba(226,155,84,.35)}
.ft-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.5fr 1fr 1fr 1.2fr;gap:36px;padding-bottom:40px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1)}
footer .logo{color:#fff;margin-bottom:16px}
footer .logo small{color:rgba(255,255,255,.5)}
footer h4{color:#fff;font-size:13px;letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:16px;font-weight:700}
footer ul{list-style:none;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px}
footer a:hover{color:#fff}
.ft-bot{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;gap:16px;flex-wrap:wrap;padding-top:24px;font-size:13px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5)}

/* social icons */
.soc{display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap}
.soc a{width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:50%;display:grid;place-items:center;background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.18);color:#fff;transition:transform .18s,background .18s,border-color .18s}
.soc a:hover{transform:translateY(-3px);background:var(--indigo);border-color:var(--indigo);color:#fff}
.soc svg{width:19px;height:19px;display:block}
.final .soc{margin-top:24px;position:relative;z-index:1}
.mnav .soc{display:flex;gap:12px;justify-content:center;margin-top:22px;padding-top:22px;border-top:1px solid var(--lilac-line)}
.mnav .soc a{width:46px;height:46px;display:grid;place-items:center;padding:0;border-bottom:0;border-radius:13px;background:var(--lilac);border:1px solid var(--lilac-line);color:var(--indigo)}.mnav .soc a svg{width:22px;height:22px}
.mnav .soc a:hover{background:var(--indigo);border-color:var(--indigo);color:#fff}
/* topbar mini socials */
.tb-soc{display:inline-flex;gap:0;align-items:center}
.tsb{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:26px;height:26px;border-radius:50%;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.3);background:transparent;color:rgba(255,255,255,.75);cursor:pointer;padding:0;transition:background .25s,color .25s,transform .4s cubic-bezier(.16,.7,.2,1)}
.tsb svg{width:13px;height:13px}
.tb-soc.open .tsb,.tb-soc:hover .tsb{background:rgba(255,255,255,.16);color:#fff;transform:rotate(90deg)}
.tsr a{display:inline-flex;color:rgba(255,255,255,.6)}
.tsr a:hover{color:#fff}
.tsr a svg{width:15px;height:15px}
.tsr{display:inline-flex;gap:11px;align-items:center;max-width:0;opacity:0;overflow:hidden;transition:max-width .55s cubic-bezier(.16,.7,.2,1),opacity .35s,margin .4s}
.tb-soc.open .tsr,.tb-soc:hover .tsr{max-width:170px;opacity:1;margin-left:10px}
.js.noanim .tsr{max-width:170px!important;opacity:1!important;margin-left:10px!important}
.tb-soc a{display:inline-flex;color:rgba(255,255,255,.55);transition:color .15s}
.tb-soc a:hover{color:#fff}
.tb-soc svg{width:16px;height:16px;display:block}

/* floating wa */
.fab{position:fixed;right:22px;bottom:22px;z-index:60;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;background:#fff;border-radius:var(--pill);padding:10px 18px 10px 12px;box-shadow:0 16px 40px -12px rgba(0,0,0,.3);font-weight:700;font-size:14px;color:var(--ink)}
.fab .wa{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--wa);display:grid;place-items:center;flex:none}

/* reveal */
/* reveal: NEVER hides content — opacity always 1, only a subtle slide */
.reveal{opacity:1}
.js .reveal{opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px);transition:opacity .7s cubic-bezier(.16,.7,.2,1),transform .7s cubic-bezier(.16,.7,.2,1)}
.js .reveal.in{opacity:1;transform:none}
.js .stg>*{opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px);transition:opacity .6s cubic-bezier(.16,.7,.2,1),transform .6s cubic-bezier(.16,.7,.2,1)}
.js .stg.in>*{opacity:1;transform:none}
.js .stg.in>*:nth-child(2){transition-delay:.08s}.js .stg.in>*:nth-child(3){transition-delay:.16s}
.js .stg.in>*:nth-child(4){transition-delay:.24s}.js .stg.in>*:nth-child(5){transition-delay:.32s}.js .stg.in>*:nth-child(6){transition-delay:.4s}
@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.js .reveal,.js .stg>*{opacity:1!important;transform:none!important}}
.js.noanim .reveal,.js.noanim .stg>*{transition:none!important;opacity:1!important;transform:none!important}
.js.noanim .hero .vcard,.js.noanim .vplay{animation:none!important}

/* checker */
.checker .wrap{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--lilac),#fff);border:1px solid var(--lilac-line);border-radius:var(--r-lg);padding:52px 48px;text-align:center}
.checker h2{margin-bottom:12px}
.checker>.wrap>p{color:var(--ink-2);max-width:620px;margin:0 auto 32px;font-size:16.5px}
.chk-opts{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:16px;max-width:860px;margin:0 auto 24px}
.chk{background:#fff;border:1.5px solid var(--line);border-radius:var(--r);padding:26px 18px;transition:transform .18s,border-color .18s,box-shadow .18s}
.chk:hover{transform:translateY(-4px);border-color:var(--indigo);box-shadow:var(--sh-sm)}
.chk .ci{width:50px;height:50px;border-radius:15px;background:var(--lilac);display:grid;place-items:center;margin:0 auto 14px}
.chk b{display:block;font-size:15.5px;color:var(--ink);margin-bottom:3px}
.chk span{font-size:12.5px;color:var(--ink-3)}
.checker .fine{font-size:13px;color:var(--ink-3)}
/* geo */
.geo{text-align:center;padding:36px 30px;background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:var(--r);box-shadow:var(--sh-sm)}
.geo p{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);margin-bottom:18px;font-size:16px}
.geo .chips{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;justify-content:center}
.geo .chip{background:var(--cream);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:var(--pill);padding:8px 16px;font-size:13.5px;color:var(--ink-2);font-weight:600}
/* motion */
@keyframes drift{0%,100%{transform:translate(0,0)}50%{transform:translate(24px,-22px)}}
@keyframes pulseDot{0%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(226,155,84,.5)}70%{box-shadow:0 0 0 10px rgba(226,155,84,0)}100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(226,155,84,0)}}
.hero::before{animation:drift 20s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1) 1 forwards}
.hero::after{animation:drift 26s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1) reverse 1 forwards}
@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.hero::before,.hero::after,.vcard{animation:none}}
.seal{position:relative}
.seal::before{content:"";position:absolute;inset:10px;border:1px solid rgba(226,155,84,.35);border-radius:50%}
@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.seal::before{animation:none}}
.btn{position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.btn-primary::after,.btn-gold::after{content:"";position:absolute;top:0;left:-60%;width:40%;height:100%;background:linear-gradient(100deg,transparent,rgba(255,255,255,.35),transparent);transform:skewX(-18deg);transition:left .5s}
.btn-primary:hover::after,.btn-gold:hover::after{left:130%}
/* people band */
.ppl-band{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:26px;background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:var(--r);padding:22px 30px;box-shadow:var(--sh-sm);flex-wrap:wrap}
.ppl-photos{display:flex}
.ppl-photos img{width:64px;height:64px;border-radius:18px;object-fit:cover;border:3px solid #fff;margin-left:-16px;box-shadow:0 8px 18px -8px rgba(26,24,36,.35)}
.ppl-photos img:first-child{margin-left:0}
.ppl-txt b{font-size:17px;display:block;color:var(--ink)}.ppl-txt span{font-size:14px;color:var(--ink-3)}
.ppl-band .go{margin-left:auto;font-weight:700;color:var(--indigo);white-space:nowrap}
/* recurring lead band */
.leadband{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--lilac),#fff);border:1px solid var(--lilac-line);border-radius:var(--r-lg);padding:38px 44px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:28px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.leadband .lb-t{font-size:23px;font-weight:800;color:var(--ink);letter-spacing:-.01em}
.leadband .lb-s{font-size:15px;color:var(--ink-2);margin-top:6px}
.leadband form{display:flex;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.leadband input{font-family:var(--font);font-size:15px;padding:14px 18px;border:1.5px solid var(--line);border-radius:var(--pill);min-width:180px;background:#fff}
.leadband input:focus{outline:none;border-color:var(--indigo)}
/* scroll reminder toast */
.remind{position:fixed;right:22px;bottom:92px;z-index:59;max-width:330px;background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:20px;box-shadow:0 24px 60px -18px rgba(26,24,36,.4);padding:18px 20px;transform:translateY(30px);opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:opacity .4s,transform .4s}
.remind.show{transform:none;opacity:1;pointer-events:auto}
.remind .rc{display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:flex-start}
.remind .rd{width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:11px;background:var(--gold-soft);flex:none;display:grid;place-items:center;position:relative}
.remind .rd i{position:absolute;top:-2px;right:-2px;width:9px;height:9px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--gold);animation:none}
.remind.show .rd i{animation:pulseDot 1.8s 3}
.remind b{font-size:15px}.remind p{font-size:13px;color:var(--ink-2);margin:2px 0 12px}
.remind .rb{display:flex;gap:8px}
.remind .rx{position:absolute;top:10px;right:12px;color:var(--ink-3);font-size:18px;line-height:1;cursor:pointer;background:none;border:0}
.remind .btn{padding:11px 16px;font-size:13.5px}
@media(max-width:640px){.remind{display:none}.leadband{padding:28px 22px}.ppl-band .go{margin-left:0}}
.hero-feats{display:flex;gap:20px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:26px}
.hero-feats span{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-size:14.5px;font-weight:600;color:var(--ink-2)}
/* about */
.about{background:#fff}
.about-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:56px;align-items:center}
.about-lead{font-size:19px;color:var(--ink-2);margin:18px 0 22px}
.about-note{background:var(--lilac);border-radius:var(--r);padding:22px 24px;font-size:15px;color:var(--ink-2);margin-bottom:22px}
.about-feats{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px}
.about-feats div{display:flex;gap:12px;font-size:15px;color:var(--ink-2)}
.about-feats b{color:var(--ink)}
.ab-pts{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:18px}
.ab-pt{background:var(--cream);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:var(--r);padding:24px}
.ab-pt .n{font-size:12px;font-weight:800;color:var(--gold-2);letter-spacing:.1em;margin-bottom:8px}
.ab-pt b{display:block;font-size:16.5px;margin-bottom:6px}
.ab-pt span{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--ink-2)}
/* 11 services */
.svc11{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:16px}
.s11{background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:var(--r-sm);padding:22px 20px;padding-right:44px;transition:transform .18s,border-color .18s,box-shadow .18s;display:block}
.s11:hover{transform:translateY(-3px);border-color:var(--indigo);box-shadow:var(--sh-sm)}
.s11 b{display:block;font-size:15.5px;margin-bottom:5px;color:var(--ink)}
.s11 span{font-size:13px;color:var(--ink-3)}
.s11.ask{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--lilac),#fff);border-color:var(--lilac-line)}
/* path 7 steps */
.path{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0;background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:var(--r-lg);overflow:hidden;box-shadow:var(--sh-sm)}
.prow{display:grid;grid-template-columns:56px 1fr 150px;gap:20px;align-items:center;padding:22px 28px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line)}
.prow:last-child{border-bottom:0}
.prow:hover{background:var(--cream)}
.prow .pn{width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:12px;background:var(--lilac);color:var(--indigo);font-weight:800;font-size:15px;display:grid;place-items:center}
.prow b{display:block;font-size:16px;margin-bottom:3px}
.prow p{font-size:14px;color:var(--ink-2)}
.prow .pt{justify-self:end;font-size:12.5px;font-weight:700;color:var(--gold-2);background:var(--gold-soft);padding:7px 13px;border-radius:var(--pill);white-space:nowrap}
/* waits */
.waits{background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:var(--r-lg);padding:38px 40px;box-shadow:var(--sh-sm)}
.wscale{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:12px;color:var(--ink-3);margin-bottom:16px;font-weight:600}
.wrow{display:grid;grid-template-columns:230px 1fr 90px;gap:18px;align-items:center;margin-bottom:16px}
.wrow .wn b{display:block;font-size:15px}.wrow .wn span{font-size:12.5px;color:var(--ink-3)}
.wtrack{height:12px;background:var(--lilac);border-radius:var(--pill);position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.wbar{position:absolute;height:100%;border-radius:var(--pill);background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--indigo-2),var(--indigo))}
.wrow .wv{justify-self:end;font-weight:800;font-size:14.5px;color:var(--indigo)}
.wnote{margin-top:22px;background:var(--lilac);border-radius:var(--r);padding:20px 22px;font-size:14.5px;color:var(--ink-2);max-width:78ch}
.wnote b{color:var(--ink)}
/* cabinet */
.cab .wrap{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--lilac),#fff);border:1px solid var(--lilac-line);border-radius:var(--r-lg);padding:48px 44px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 380px;gap:44px;align-items:center}
.cabcard{background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:var(--r);padding:24px;box-shadow:var(--sh)}
.cabcard .ch{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:12.5px;color:var(--ink-3);margin-bottom:16px;font-weight:600}
.cabrow{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:11px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);font-size:14px}
.cabrow:last-of-type{border-bottom:0}
.cabrow i{font-style:normal;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:#2E8B57;background:#E4F3EC;padding:5px 10px;border-radius:var(--pill)}
.cabrow i.w{color:var(--gold-2);background:var(--gold-soft)}
.cabbar{margin-top:16px}
.cabbar .cb{height:10px;background:var(--lilac);border-radius:var(--pill);overflow:hidden;margin-top:8px}
.cabbar .cbf{height:100%;width:91%;border-radius:var(--pill);background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--indigo-2),var(--gold))}
@media(max-width:1000px){.about-grid,.cab .wrap{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:34px}.svc11{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}}
@media(max-width:640px){

  .js .hero .eyebrow,.js .hero h1,.js .hero .lead,.js .hero .hero-ctas,.js .hero .hero-feats,.js .hero .proof,.js .hero .vcard{opacity:1!important;transform:none!important;transition:none!important}
  .js .hero .vcard,.js .hero .vplay,.js .fab{animation:none!important}
  .js .geo .chip,.js .ref .num .big{opacity:1!important;transform:none!important;transition:none!important}
  nav.main a::after,.dir .ic,.dir .go,.rev,.ppl-photos img{transition:none!important}
  .sprog{display:none}
}
/* alive photos */
.ab-shots{position:relative;margin-top:36px;height:296px;max-width:520px}
.ab-shots img{position:absolute;object-fit:cover;border-radius:var(--r-sm);border:4px solid #fff;box-shadow:var(--sh);filter:saturate(.9)}
.ab-shots .big{width:74%;height:252px;left:0;top:0;transform:rotate(-2deg)}
.ab-shots .sm{width:44%;height:184px;right:0;bottom:0;transform:rotate(2deg)}
.guar .wrap{background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(42,37,57,.93),rgba(90,80,121,.88)),url(/assets/trc/ph_handshake.jpg) center/cover}
.vs-proof{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin-top:26px;font-size:13.5px;font-weight:700;color:var(--ink-2)}
.vs-proof .avs{display:flex;flex:none}
.vs-proof .avs img{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;border:2px solid #fff;box-shadow:0 3px 8px rgba(26,24,36,.18);filter:saturate(.9)}
.vs-proof .avs img+img{margin-left:-10px}
.checker .wrap{overflow:hidden}
.checker .wrap>*:not(.bg-art){position:relative;z-index:1}
.lb-left{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:18px;min-width:260px}
.lb-face{width:74px;height:74px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;border:3px solid #fff;box-shadow:var(--sh);flex:none;filter:saturate(.9)}
.lb-badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;margin-top:10px;font-size:12.5px;font-weight:700;color:var(--indigo);background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--lilac-line);border-radius:var(--pill);padding:5px 12px}
.lb-badge i{width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;background:#2E8B57;flex:none}
.rev-rail{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:16px;margin-bottom:36px}
.rev-rail img{width:100%;height:150px;object-fit:cover;border-radius:var(--r-sm);box-shadow:var(--sh-sm);filter:saturate(.9);transition:transform .25s}
.rev-rail img:hover{transform:translateY(-5px)}
@media(max-width:640px){
  .ab-shots{height:auto;max-width:none;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px;margin-top:28px}
  .ab-shots img{position:static}
  .ab-shots .big,.ab-shots .sm{width:100%;height:180px}
  .ab-shots .big{transform:rotate(-1deg)}
  .ab-shots .sm{transform:rotate(1deg)}
  .rev-rail{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px}
  .rev-rail img{height:120px}
  .lb-face{display:none}
  .lb-left{min-width:0}
}
/* alive2 — второй слой жизни: параллакс, кен-бёрнс, живые цитаты, прогулка пути, вход подстраниц, tilt, искра */
/* a1) параллакс фоновых сцен: transform задаёт JS (rAF); запас по высоте, чтобы сдвиг не оголял края */
@media(min-width:1000px){
  .js.plx .bg-art{top:-28px;bottom:auto;height:calc(100% + 56px);will-change:transform}
}
/* a2) кен-бёрнс: дышащий фото-слой (::before, z-index:-1) под штатным градиент-фоном — читаемость текста не меняется */
.guar .wrap::before,.final .wrap::before{content:"";position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:-1;pointer-events:none;background-position:center;background-size:cover;background-repeat:no-repeat}
.guar .wrap::before{background-image:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(42,37,57,.93),rgba(90,80,121,.88)),url(/assets/trc/ph_handshake.jpg)}
.final .wrap::before{background-image:linear-gradient(140deg,rgba(42,37,57,.92),rgba(90,80,121,.88)),url(/assets/trc/nx_team1.jpg)}
@keyframes kenb{to{transform:scale(1.06)}}
.js:not(.noanim) .guar .wrap::before{animation:kenb 22s ease-out 1 forwards}
.js:not(.noanim) .final .wrap::before{animation:kenb 24s ease-out 1 forwards}
/* a3) живые цитаты в герое (высота фиксирована — без прыжков) */
.hq{margin-top:16px;min-height:44px;display:flex;align-items:center}
.hq-in{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;transition:opacity .5s ease}
.hq-in.out{opacity:0}
.hq-in img{width:26px;height:26px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;border:2px solid #fff;box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(26,24,36,.18);flex:none}
.hq-q{font-size:13.5px;line-height:1.35;color:var(--ink-2)}
.hq-in b{font-size:12.5px;color:var(--ink-3);flex:none}
.js .hero .hq{transform:translateY(16px);transition:transform .7s cubic-bezier(.16,.7,.2,1)}
.js.hero-in .hero .hq{opacity:1;transform:none;transition-delay:.54s}
/* a4) автопрогулка по «Пути дела» (класс .lit ставит JS) */
.js .path .prow{transition:opacity .7s cubic-bezier(.16,.7,.2,1),transform .7s cubic-bezier(.16,.7,.2,1),background-color .5s ease}
.js .path .prow .pn{transition:transform .7s cubic-bezier(.16,.7,.2,1),background-color .45s ease,color .45s ease}
.prow.lit{background:var(--cream)}
.prow.lit .pn{background:var(--indigo);color:#fff}
/* a5) вход героев подстраниц (элементы помечает JS классом ph-i) */
.js .ph-i{opacity:0;transform:translateY(16px);transition:opacity .7s cubic-bezier(.16,.7,.2,1),transform .7s cubic-bezier(.16,.7,.2,1)}
.js.page-in .ph-i{opacity:1;transform:none}
/* a7) золотая искра на печати 98% (класс .shine ставит JS раз в ~7с) */
.seal::after{content:"";position:absolute;inset:0;border-radius:50%;pointer-events:none;opacity:0;background:linear-gradient(115deg,transparent 40%,rgba(255,230,186,.4) 49%,rgba(255,243,220,.5) 51%,transparent 60%);background-size:300% 300%;background-position:0% 0}
@keyframes sealshine{0%{background-position:0% 0;opacity:0}18%{opacity:1}82%{opacity:1}100%{background-position:100% 0;opacity:0}}
.seal.shine::after{animation:sealshine 1.5s ease-in-out}
/* alive2: защита для краулеров (noanim) — мгновенный ФИНАЛ */
.js.noanim .guar .wrap::before,.js.noanim .final .wrap::before,.js.noanim .seal.shine::after{animation:none!important}
.js.noanim .hero .hq,.js.noanim .ph-i{opacity:1!important;transform:none!important;transition:none!important}
.js.noanim .bg-art,.js.noanim .vplayer{transform:none!important}
.js.noanim .prow.lit{background:none}.js.noanim .prow.lit .pn{background:var(--lilac);color:var(--indigo)}
/* alive2: prefers-reduced-motion — полный откат в финал */
@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){
  .guar .wrap::before,.final .wrap::before,.seal.shine::after{animation:none!important}
  .js .hero .hq,.js .ph-i{opacity:1!important;transform:none!important;transition:none!important}
  .js .bg-art,.js .vplayer{transform:none!important}
  .prow.lit{background:none}.prow.lit .pn{background:var(--lilac);color:var(--indigo)}
  .hq-in{transition:none}
}
@media(min-width:1000px){.js.plx section:has(>.bg-art){overflow:clip}}
/* live3 — фото-разрывы + микро-анимации */
/* l1) полноширинный фото-разрыв: цвет приглушён, тёмно-синие края для перехода, строка-факт по центру */
.pbreak{position:relative;height:300px;overflow:hidden;background:var(--indigo-9)}
.pbreak .pb-img{position:absolute;left:0;top:-40px;width:100%;height:calc(100% + 80px);object-fit:cover;filter:saturate(.85)}
.pbreak::after{content:"";position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(24,21,32,.52),rgba(24,21,32,.16) 32%,rgba(24,21,32,.16) 68%,rgba(24,21,32,.52)),radial-gradient(130% 110% at 50% 50%,transparent 52%,rgba(24,21,32,.32));pointer-events:none}
.pbreak .pb-line{position:absolute;left:0;right:0;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);z-index:1;margin:0;padding:0 20px;text-align:center;color:rgba(255,255,255,.93);font-size:13px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;text-shadow:0 1px 12px rgba(24,21,32,.6)}
@media(min-width:1000px){.pbreak .pb-img{will-change:transform}}
.pbreak .pb-img{will-change:transform}
@media(max-width:640px){.pbreak{height:180px}.pbreak .pb-img{top:0;height:100%}.pbreak .pb-line{font-size:11.5px;letter-spacing:.12em}}
/* l2а) галочки в .dir li: прорисовка stroke при появлении карточки, каскад */
.js .dir.reveal li svg path{stroke-dasharray:24;stroke-dashoffset:24;transition:stroke-dashoffset .55s cubic-bezier(.16,.7,.2,1) .18s}
.js .dir.reveal.in li svg path{stroke-dashoffset:0}
.js .dir.reveal.in li:nth-child(2) svg path{transition-delay:.3s}
.js .dir.reveal.in li:nth-child(3) svg path{transition-delay:.42s}
.js .dir.reveal.in li:nth-child(4) svg path{transition-delay:.54s}
.js .dir.reveal.in li:nth-child(5) svg path{transition-delay:.66s}
/* l2б) иконка .dir .ic: один мягкий «вдох» при появлении (без fill — hover-transform живёт дальше) */
@keyframes icBreath{0%{transform:scale(1)}45%{transform:scale(1.06)}100%{transform:scale(1)}}
.js .dir.reveal.in .ic{animation:icBreath .9s cubic-bezier(.16,.7,.2,1) .3s 1}
.js .dir.reveal.in.i2 .ic{animation-delay:.42s}
.js .dir.reveal.in.i3 .ic{animation-delay:.54s}
.js .dir.reveal.in.i4 .ic{animation-delay:.66s}
/* l2в) фото-рейл отзывов: лёгкий tilt + подъём при hover */
.rev-rail img{transition:transform .28s cubic-bezier(.16,.7,.2,1),box-shadow .28s}
.rev-rail img:hover{transform:translateY(-6px) rotate(-1.5deg);box-shadow:var(--sh)}
/* l2д) номер этапа при автопрогулке: лёгкий пульс вместе с подсветкой .lit */
@keyframes pnPulse{0%{transform:scale(1)}45%{transform:scale(1.12)}100%{transform:scale(1)}}
.js:not(.noanim) .prow.lit .pn{animation:pnPulse .7s cubic-bezier(.16,.7,.2,1) 1}
/* l2е) фокус-кольцо основной кнопки (hover-подъём уже есть) */
.btn-primary:focus-visible{outline:none;box-shadow:0 0 0 3px var(--cream),0 0 0 6px var(--indigo),0 14px 30px -12px rgba(95,82,137,.6)}
/* l3) подстраницы (без section.hero): фоновые сцены чуть заметнее на десктопе */
@media(min-width:1000px){body:not(:has(section.hero)) .bg-art{opacity:.13}}
/* live3: защита noanim — мгновенный финал */
.js.noanim .dir.reveal li svg path{stroke-dashoffset:0!important;transition:none!important}
.js.noanim .dir .ic,.js.noanim .prow.lit .pn{animation:none!important}
.js.noanim .pbreak .pb-img{transform:none!important}
/* live3: prefers-reduced-motion — финал без движения */
@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){
  .js .dir.reveal li svg path{stroke-dashoffset:0!important;transition:none!important}
  .dir .ic,.prow.lit .pn{animation:none!important}
  .pbreak .pb-img{transform:none!important}
  .rev-rail img:hover{transform:none}
}

/* process: живые этапы */
.steps-grid{position:relative}
.step{z-index:1;transition:transform .35s cubic-bezier(.16,.7,.2,1),box-shadow .35s}
.step:hover{transform:translateY(-6px);box-shadow:0 3px 6px rgba(26,24,36,.05),0 34px 64px -30px rgba(42,37,57,.4)}
@media(min-width:900px){
  .steps-grid::before{content:"";position:absolute;left:30px;right:30px;top:52px;height:3px;border-radius:3px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--indigo-2),var(--indigo),var(--gold));transform:scaleX(0);transform-origin:left;transition:transform 1.1s cubic-bezier(.16,.7,.2,1) .25s;z-index:0}
  .steps-grid.in::before{transform:scaleX(1)}
}
.js .step .num{transform:scale(.4) rotate(-10deg);transition:transform .7s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1)}
.js .step.in .num{transform:none}
.js .steps-grid .step:nth-child(1).in .num{transition-delay:.1s}
.js .steps-grid .step:nth-child(2).in .num{transition-delay:.26s}
.js .steps-grid .step:nth-child(3).in .num{transition-delay:.42s}
.js .steps-grid .step:nth-child(4).in .num{transition-delay:.58s}
.js .step.in:hover .num{transform:scale(1.07) rotate(3deg);transition:transform .35s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1)}
.js #process .step h3,.js #process .step p{opacity:0;transform:translateY(10px);transition:opacity .55s cubic-bezier(.16,.7,.2,1),transform .55s cubic-bezier(.16,.7,.2,1)}
.js #process .step.in h3{opacity:1;transform:none;transition-delay:.2s}
.js #process .step.in p{opacity:1;transform:none;transition-delay:.32s}
html.noanim .step .num,html.noanim #process .step h3,html.noanim #process .step p{opacity:1!important;transform:none!important;transition:none!important}
html.noanim .steps-grid::before{transform:scaleX(1)!important;transition:none!important}
@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.step:hover{transform:none}.js #process .step h3,.js #process .step p,.js .step .num{opacity:1;transform:none;transition:none}.steps-grid::before{transform:scaleX(1);transition:none}}

/* fixed bottom action bar: Call + Free consultation */
.fbar{position:fixed;right:22px;bottom:22px;z-index:60;display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:center}
.fbar-btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;border-radius:var(--pill);padding:14px 22px;font-weight:800;font-size:15px;text-decoration:none;box-shadow:var(--sh-sm);transition:transform .2s cubic-bezier(.16,.7,.2,1),box-shadow .2s}
.fbar-btn:hover{transform:translateY(-2px)}
.fbar-call{background:#fff;color:var(--ink);border:1px solid var(--line)}
.fbar-call svg{color:var(--indigo)}
.fbar-wa{background:var(--wa);color:#062b16}
@media(max-width:640px){
  .fbar{left:0;right:0;bottom:0;gap:8px;padding:9px 12px calc(9px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom));background:rgba(255,255,255,.97);backdrop-filter:saturate(1.3) blur(10px);border-top:1px solid var(--line);box-shadow:0 -10px 28px -18px rgba(26,24,36,.4)}
  .fbar-btn{padding:14px 14px;font-size:15px;box-shadow:none;border-radius:16px}
  .fbar-call{flex:0 0 auto}
  .fbar-call .fbar-lab{display:none}
  .fbar-wa{flex:1 1 auto;justify-content:center}
  .fab-bub,.remind{bottom:88px!important}

}

/* declutter первого экрана: нижняя панель и quiz-кнопка — после скролла за герой */
.fbar{transition:opacity .35s cubic-bezier(.16,.7,.2,1),transform .35s cubic-bezier(.16,.7,.2,1)}
body:not(.ls-scrolled) .fbar{opacity:0;transform:translateY(18px);pointer-events:none}
body.ls-scrolled .fbar{opacity:1;transform:none;pointer-events:auto}

body.ls-scrolled #lsq-fab{opacity:1;transform:none;pointer-events:auto}
#lsq-fab{transition:opacity .35s,transform .35s}
@media(max-width:640px){body:not(.ls-scrolled) .fbar{transform:translateY(100%)}}

/* --- reviews rv2 --- */
/* ===== Reviews — Magazine Column (rv2) ===== */
.reviews.rv2{background:var(--cream)}
.rv2-mag{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(250px,.82fr) 1.18fr;gap:56px;align-items:start}

/* Left editorial rail */
.rv2-rail{position:sticky;top:100px;align-self:start}
.rv2-title{margin:.3em 0 .5em;font-size:clamp(30px,4vw,44px);line-height:1.05;letter-spacing:-.02em;color:var(--ink)}
.rv2-intro{margin:0 0 30px;max-width:40ch;color:var(--ink-2);font-size:16.5px;line-height:1.62}
.rv2-trust{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;margin-bottom:28px;padding:20px 0;border-top:1px solid var(--line);border-bottom:1px solid var(--line)}
.rv2-score{font-size:46px;line-height:1;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-.03em;color:var(--ink)}
.rv2-trust-meta{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px}
.rv2-trust-label{max-width:22ch;color:var(--ink-2);font-size:12.5px;line-height:1.4}
.rv2-scene{margin:0;border-radius:var(--r-sm);overflow:hidden;box-shadow:var(--sh-sm)}
.rv2-scene img{display:block;width:100%;height:280px;object-fit:cover}
.rv2-scene figcaption{padding:14px 18px;background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--line);border-top:none;color:var(--ink-2);font-size:13px;line-height:1.5}

/* Shared bits */
.rv2-stars{color:var(--gold);font-size:13px;letter-spacing:2px;line-height:1}
.rv2-stars-lg{font-size:16px;letter-spacing:4px}
.rv2-result{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;color:var(--indigo-9);font-size:11.5px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.01em;white-space:nowrap}
.rv2-result::before{content:"";flex:none;width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--gold)}
.rv2-av{flex:none;width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;border:2px solid #fff;box-shadow:var(--sh-sm)}
.rv2-av-lg{width:56px;height:56px}
.rv2-cite{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:3px;min-width:0;line-height:1.25}
.rv2-cite b{color:var(--ink);font-size:14.5px;font-weight:700}
.rv2-tag{color:var(--ink-2);font-size:12.5px}
.rv2-cred{position:relative;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:13px;margin-top:18px;padding-top:18px;border-top:1px solid var(--line)}
.rv2-cred::before{content:"";position:absolute;top:-1px;left:0;width:38px;height:2px;border-radius:2px;background:var(--gold)}

/* Right column grid */
.rv2-col{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:20px;align-content:start}

/* Featured pull-quote */
.rv2-feature{position:relative;grid-column:1/-1;margin:0;padding:36px 40px 30px;background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:var(--r);box-shadow:var(--sh-sm);overflow:hidden}
.rv2-quote{position:absolute;top:-6px;left:26px;z-index:0;font-family:Georgia,'Times New Roman',serif;font-size:120px;line-height:1;color:var(--indigo-2);opacity:.45;pointer-events:none;user-select:none}
.rv2-feature blockquote{position:relative;z-index:1;margin:34px 0 26px;font-size:clamp(21px,2.5vw,27px);line-height:1.38;letter-spacing:-.01em;font-weight:500;color:var(--ink)}
.rv2-fmeta{flex:none;margin-left:auto;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-end;gap:6px;text-align:right}

/* Standard entries */
.rv2-entry{display:flex;flex-direction:column;margin:0;padding:24px 26px;background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:var(--r-sm);box-shadow:var(--sh-sm);transition:transform .25s ease,box-shadow .25s ease,border-color .25s ease}
.rv2-entry:hover{transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:var(--sh);border-color:var(--indigo-2)}
.rv2-etop{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;margin-bottom:15px}
.rv2-entry blockquote{margin:0;flex:1 1 auto;color:var(--ink-2);font-size:15px;line-height:1.6}
.rv2-entry .rv2-cred{margin-top:20px}

/* Closing full-width entry */
.rv2-span{grid-column:1/-1;align-items:center;text-align:center}
.rv2-span .rv2-etop{justify-content:center;gap:16px}
.rv2-span blockquote{max-width:46ch;margin:0 auto;color:var(--ink);font-size:17px;line-height:1.55}
.rv2-span .rv2-cred{justify-content:center;flex:none}
.rv2-span .rv2-cred::before{left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%)}

/* Responsive — collapse to a single column */
@media(max-width:920px){
 .rv2-mag{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:38px}
 .rv2-rail{position:static}
 .rv2-intro{max-width:none}
 .rv2-scene img{height:240px}
}
@media(max-width:640px){
 .rv2-col{grid-template-columns:1fr}
 .rv2-feature{padding:28px 22px 24px}
 .rv2-feature blockquote{margin-top:30px;font-size:20px}
 .rv2-quote{left:16px;font-size:100px}
 .rv2-cred-lg{flex-wrap:wrap}
 .rv2-fmeta{margin-left:0}
}
